name: Data Science & Analysis
description: Comprehensive data science toolkit for statistical analysis, data wrangling, visualization, and machine learning. Supports CSV/JSON/Parquet ingestion, exploratory data analysis, hypothesis testing, regression, classification, clustering, and publication-quality chart generation. Designed for research workflows where data integrity and reproducibility are paramount.
uncertaintyModel: Statistical uncertainty quantified via confidence intervals, p-values, and bootstrap resampling. Model uncertainty assessed through cross-validation scores and residual analysis. Data quality issues flagged as missing-value ratios and outlier counts.
